rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by fixing unresolved references or type mismatches in AGREE annexes
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
Align helper declaration types with the expression types in guarantees
Use int, real, and bool as valid AGREE scalar type names
Remove invalid guarantees instead of adding architecture when references cannot be resolved
generic_rules: Minimize repairs to only address validator diagnostics
Preserve existing architecture and contracts when possible
Use only visible identifiers in the current scope
Align types in helper declarations with the expression types in guarantees
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use int, real, and bool as valid AGREE scalar type names
Use eq helpers for complex expressions in guarantees
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
anti_patterns: Do not add architecture to fix unresolved references
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar type names like integer or boolean
Do not use guarantees in implementation scope
